Uses of Interface
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.extension.ExtensibleObjectVerifier

Packages that use ExtensibleObjectVerifier
Package
Description
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.guava
Classes used to verify preconditions, postconditions and invariants of Guava types.
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java
Classes used to verify preconditions, postconditions and invariants of core Java types.
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.extension
Interfaces that may be extended but not implemented (because the methods contain a generic return type).
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal
Design guide
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal.extension
 

  • Uses of ExtensibleObjectVerifier in com.github.cowwoc.requirements.guava

    Subinterfaces of ExtensibleObjectVerifier in com.github.cowwoc.requirements.guava
    Modifier and Type
    Interface
    Description
    interface 
    MultimapVerifier<K,V>
    Verifies the requirements of a Multimap.

    Subinterfaces of ExtensibleObjectVerifier in com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java
    Modifier and Type
    Interface
    Description
    interface 
    ArrayVerifier<A,E>
    Verifies the requirements of an array.
    interface 
    BigDecimalPrecisionVerifier
    Verifies the requirements of a BigDecimal.precision().
    interface 
    BigDecimalVerifier
    Verifies the requirements of a BigDecimal value.
    interface 
    BooleanVerifier
    Verifies the requirements of a boolean value.
    interface 
    ClassVerifier<T>
    Verifies the requirements of a Class value.
    interface 
    CollectionVerifier<C extends Collection<E>,E>
    Verifies the requirements of a Collection.
    interface 
    ComparableVerifier<T extends Comparable<? super T>>
    Verifies the requirements of a Comparable.
    interface 
    FloatingPointVerifier<T extends Number & Comparable<? super T>>
    Verifies the requirements of a floating-point number.
    interface 
    InetAddressVerifier
    Verifies the requirements of an IP address or hostname.
    interface 
    IntegerVerifier<T extends Number & Comparable<? super T>>
    Verifies the requirements of an integer number.
    interface 
    ListVerifier<L extends List<E>,E>
    Verifies the requirements of a list.
    interface 
    MapVerifier<K,V>
    Verifies the requirements of a Map.
    interface 
    NumberVerifier<T extends Number & Comparable<? super T>>
    Verifies the requirements of for a Number.
    interface 
    ObjectVerifier<T>
    Verifies the requirements of an Object.
    interface 
    OptionalVerifier
    Verifies the requirements of an Optional.
    interface 
    PathVerifier
    Verifies the requirements of a Path.
    interface 
    PrimitiveBooleanVerifier
    Verifies the requirements of a primitive boolean value.
    interface 
    PrimitiveCharacterVerifier
    Verifies the requirements of a Comparable value.
    interface 
    PrimitiveFloatingPointVerifier<T extends Number & Comparable<? super T>>
    Verifies the requirements of a primitive floating-point number.
    interface 
    PrimitiveIntegerVerifier<T extends Number & Comparable<? super T>>
    Verifies the requirements of a primitive integer number.
    interface 
    PrimitiveNumberVerifier<T extends Number & Comparable<? super T>>
    Verifies the requirements of a primitive number (e.g.
    interface 
    SizeVerifier
    Verifies the requirements of the size of a collection.
    interface 
    StringVerifier
    Verifies the requirements of a String.
    interface 
    UriVerifier
    Verifies the requirements of a URI.
    interface 
    UrlVerifier
    Verifies the requirements of a URL.

  • Uses of ExtensibleObjectVerifier in com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.extension

    Subinterfaces of ExtensibleObjectVerifier in com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.extension
    Modifier and Type
    Interface
    Description
    interface 
    ExtensibleBooleanVerifier<S>
    Verifies the requirements of a boolean value but the implementing verifier is not guaranteed to be a BooleanVerifier.
    interface 
    ExtensibleCollectionVerifier<S,C extends Collection<E>,E>
    Verifies the requirements of a collection of elements but the implementing verifier is not guaranteed to be a CollectionVerifier.
    interface 
    ExtensibleComparableVerifier<S,T extends Comparable<? super T>>
    Verifies the requirements of a value that extends Comparable but the implementing verifier is not guaranteed to be a ComparableVerifier.
    interface 
    ExtensibleFloatingPointVerifier<S,T extends Number & Comparable<? super T>>
    Verifies the requirements of a floating-point value but the implementing verifier is not guaranteed to be a FloatingPointVerifier.
    interface 
    ExtensibleIntegerVerifier<S,T extends Number & Comparable<? super T>>
    Verifies the requirements of an integer value but the implementing verifier is not guaranteed to be a IntegerVerifier.
    interface 
    ExtensibleNumberVerifier<S,T extends Number & Comparable<? super T>>
    Verifies the requirements of a value that extends Number but the implementing verifier is not guaranteed to be a NumberVerifier.
    interface 
    ExtensiblePrimitiveVerifier<S,T>
    Verifies the requirements of a value that extends a primitive type (e.g.

  • Uses of ExtensibleObjectVerifier in com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal

    Classes in com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal that implement ExtensibleObjectVerifier
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    final class 
    ArrayVerifierImpl<A,E>
    Default implementation of ArrayVerifier.
    final class 
    ArrayVerifierNoOp<A,E>
    An ArrayVerifier that does nothing.
    final class 
    BigDecimalPrecisionVerifierImpl
    Default implementation of BigDecimalPrecisionVerifier.
    final class 
    BigDecimalPrecisionVerifierNoOp
    A BigDecimalPrecisionVerifier that does nothing.
    final class 
    BigDecimalScaleVerifierImpl
    An implementation of PrimitiveNumberVerifier for a BigDecimal's scale.
    final class 
    BigDecimalVerifierImpl
    Default implementation of BigDecimalVerifier.
    final class 
    BigDecimalVerifierNoOp
    A BigDecimalVerifier that does nothing.

    Default implementation of ComparableVerifier.

  • Uses of ExtensibleObjectVerifier in com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal.extension

    Classes in com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal.extension that implement ExtensibleObjectVerifier
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    AbstractBooleanVerifier<S,V extends ExtensibleBooleanValidator<V>>
    An implementation of ExtensibleBooleanVerifier.
    class 
    AbstractComparableVerifier<S,V extends ExtensibleComparableValidator<V,T>,T extends Comparable<? super T>>
    Extensible implementation of ExtensibleComparableVerifier.
    class 
    AbstractComparableVerifierNoOp<S,T extends Comparable<? super T>>
    A ExtensibleComparableVerifier that does nothing.
    class 
    AbstractFloatingPointVerifier<S,V extends ExtensibleFloatingPointValidator<V,T>,T extends Number & Comparable<? super T>>
    Default implementation of ExtensibleFloatingPointVerifier.
    class 
    AbstractFloatingPointVerifierNoOp<S,T extends Number & Comparable<? super T>>
    An ExtensibleFloatingPointVerifier that does nothing.
    class 
    AbstractNumberVerifier<S,V extends ExtensibleNumberValidator<V,T>,T extends Number & Comparable<? super T>>
    Default implementation of ExtensibleNumberVerifier.
    class 
    AbstractNumberVerifierNoOp<S,T extends Number & Comparable<? super T>>
    An ExtensibleNumberVerifier that does nothing.
    class 
    AbstractObjectVerifier<S,V extends ExtensibleObjectValidator<V,T>,T>
    Default implementation of ExtensibleObjectVerifier.
    class 
    AbstractObjectVerifierNoOp<S,T>
    An ExtensibleObjectVerifier that does nothing.
    class 
    AbstractPrimitiveNumberVerifierNoOp<S,T extends Number & Comparable<? super T>>
    An ExtensiblePrimitiveVerifier that does nothing.
